question: Which document subset has most of number of distinct documents ? List subset id , name and number of documents .
sql: SELECT ds.Document_Subset_ID, ds.Document_Subset_Name, COUNT(DISTINCT dsm.Document_Object_ID) AS num_documents FROM Document_Subsets ds JOIN Document_Subset_Members dsm ON ds.Document_Subset_ID = dsm.Document_Subset_ID GROUP BY ds.Document_Subset_ID, ds.Document_Subset_Name ORDER BY num_documents DESC LIMIT 1;

back_translation.intent: 查找包含最多文档的文档子集

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致。原始问题要求找出包含最多不同文档的子集，并列出子集ID、名称和文档数量。SQL反向翻译描述中通过COUNT(DISTINCT dsm.Document_Object_ID)计算不同文档数量，按Document_Subset_ID和Document_Subset_Name分组，并按数量降序排序取第一条，符合原始问题的意图。
